arguments.argument:
viscidTop=1 makeActive() setCollisionBounds(0,0,sprite_width,sprite_height)
//variables for the donut platform grav=0.5 //how fast it falls returnAfterPeriodOfTime=180 //number of steps until it returns after it falls (set to 0 to make it never return) timeUntilFall=20 //how long the character can stand on this until it falls timeUntilFallMax=20 //the max value for timeUntilFall falling=0 //is the platform falling solidIsNearPlayers=0
